channel.title: Blogs on Emma Stott
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Emma Stott

item.title: Hello, World
item.description: Hi! Welcome to my latest (and hopefully greatest) website. I’ve never been very good at maintaining a website/blog, but it’s 2017 and I really ought to have one, so here it is. After several attempts over the years on various different platforms (Blogger, Wordpress, and even a brief version hosted on GitHub Pages), I’ve finally settled on a static site powered by Hugo and self-hosted (a VPS from OVH at the time of writing).
